Englisch 9: A Prayer for Blue Delaney
1
Abgabe/Fertigstellung
bis 19.06.
Meine-Portfolios:
2
Chapter tasks
bis 19.06.

Choose at least 10 chapters of the book.

You cannot skip more than 3 chapters at once (e.g. after chapter 1 you must go on with chapter 2, 3, 4 or 5).

Create one page for each of these chapter of the story.

You can add a cover page for your reader’s log too.

You can choose from the following list. Make sure you use different ways of recording your findings. Don't choose anything more than twice.

You can choose the things you want to do freely BUT: within your 10 tasks you have to write at least three texts with ca. 100 words.

  • Write a summary of the chapter.
  • Note down the wh-questions (Who? What? Where? When? Why? and How?) and take notes on the answers.
  • Draw a picture of an important scene. Add speech or thought bubbles.
  • Turn a chapter (or a part of it) into a different text: For example, you can write a drama version, a cartoon version, a film script, a poem or a song.
  • Write a letter or a diary entry from the perspective of a character, in which this character tells another one what is going on at the moment.
  • Write a newspaper article about the events of a chapter.
  • Make a vocabulary list with the most important new words of the part (at least 8-10 words/phrases). Include the words/phrases and an English definition.
  • Write a chat room conversation between two characters. (Do not only copy an existing conversation of the book but invent an own!) You could use https://zeoob.com/generate-whatsapp-chat/
  • Design a poster about the events of the chapter.
  • Record a chapter/scene as an audio version. You can also add background noises and additional aspects.
  • Create an Instagram-/Social-media-post about the chapter.
If you have other ideas of what you could create after working with a chapter, you can also add things to this list of course. However, please ask me for approval first!

Upload your (unfinished) results at the end of (or soon after) each English lesson.

Die (sinnvolle) Nutzung von KI ist nicht grundsätzlich verboten – z.B. zum Erstellen von Bildern, Textverbesserung, ...
Bitte gebt jeweils an, welchen (englischen) Prompt ihr genutzt habt, um die Ergebnisse zu erzielen. Entweder direkt bei euren Abgaben oder im Chat („Lehrer:in fragen“) bei der jeweiligen Aufgabe.
